rulings.Case Title: RIPTIDE LLC ET AL VS. EIZA AZAR ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 19, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANTs EIZA AZAR and MARIAN AZAR's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer to the fourth and fifth causes of action is overruled. These causes of action are sufficiently alleged. Demurrer to the sixth cause of action is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiffs failed to allege facts in support of each element of this cause of action and failed to suggest what additional factual allegation can be made to state a claim for interference with prospective economic advantage by Mobley and Quinby. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 100 HOOPER FEE OWNER, LLC VS. KR 100 HOOPER, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Kr 100 Hooper, Llc And Kilroy Realty, L.P.'S Motion To Strike Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 19, 2018 line 6. Defendants KR 100 Hooper, LLC And Kilroy Realty, L.P.'S Motion To Strike Complaint GRANTED with leave to amend to allege facts in support of request for punitive damages. Amended Complaint shall be filed upon conclusion of the arbitration and lifting of the stay per ruling on Defendant's motion to compel arbitration. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 100 HOOPER FEE OWNER, LLC VS. KR 100 HOOPER, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Kr 100 Hooper, Llc And Kilroy Realty, L.P.'S Petition To Compel Arbitration In The Alternative And Stay Proceedings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 19, 2018 line 6. Defendants KR 100 Hooper, LLC And Kilroy Realty, L.P.'S Petition To Compel Arbitration In The Alternative And Stay Proceedings GRANTED in part. All of the claims relating to/connected to the draw provisions of the Agreement (2.5.1; 2.5.2; 2.5.3, etc.) are subject to the arbitration clause, including claims arising out of the draw provisions asserted against Mr. Kilroy. All of these claims shall proceed in arbitration. Motion is denied as to all other claims. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 100 HOOPER FEE OWNER, LLC VS. KR 100 HOOPER, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Kr 100 Hooper, Llc And Kilroy Realty, L.P.'S Demurrer To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 19, 2018 line 6. Defendants KR 100 Hooper, LLC And Kilroy Realty, L.P.'S Demurrer To Complaint OVERRULED. Complaint is only in part based on the asserted potential violation of the "draw" provision. Each cause of action is in addition based on other breaches and disputes. It is improper to demur only to a part of a cause of action. = (501/REQ)
